metadata.label_formula: b_e = utility_weight * (utility / 100) + cpra_weight * recipient_cPRA; q_e = b_e / (mu_G + delta); r_e = (q_e + kappa)^degree - kappa^degree; w_syn_e = max(0, mu_G * r_e / (mean_G(r) + delta))
metadata.step2b_graph_scale: mu_G = mean clean-linear label over raw valid matches
